title: Ambode, Others Condole with AFRIMA Boss Mike Dada over Wife’s Passing - FinancialEDGE

html:
Former Lagos State Governor Akinwunmi Ambode, alongside other prominent figures, paid a condolence visit to Mike Dada, the Executive Producer and President of the All Africa Music Awards (AFRIMA), following the passing of his wife, Modupe Temitope Dada.

The visit, which took place at Dada’s residence in GRA, Ikeja, Lagos State, was a show of solidarity and support during a difficult time.

Other notable figures in attendance included Steve Ayorinde, former Lagos State Commissioner for Information/Tourism, Arts & Culture, and Femi Ambode, MD/CEO of GlazeCredit.

Modupe Dada, a respected banker, was described as a woman whose strength was deeply felt, even from behind the scenes. Her passing occurred peacefully on Saturday, October 19.2024.
